overall.description: A stationary third-person view from a video game showing a robed character observing a grand hall with a central equestrian fountain statue. Other characters in school robes walk through the marble-floored interior featuring gothic architecture, grand staircases, and an ornate rear wall mural.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand hall with central fountain and gothic staircases

agents.ego_description: standing still on an upper balcony overlooking the grand hall, watching students walk below

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking past the camera from right to left in the foreground
group of students walking across the main hall floor toward the central fountain

entered.detail: large white marble fountain featuring a rearing horse with rider at the center of the hall
ornate patterned marble flooring with star and circular designs in red and beige tones
sweeping stone staircase with balustrades ascending along the left wall
sweeping stone staircase with balustrades ascending along the right wall
stone balustrade where the player character stands, overlooking the main floor
large decorative tapestry or carved stone mural covering the back wall behind the fountain

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a stationary third-person perspective from an upper balcony overlooking a grand gothic hall. A central equestrian fountain dominates the marble-floored space, flanked by grand staircases. Students in dark robes walk through the hall in various directions, with some passing close to the camera in the foreground while others gather near the fountain below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective overlooking a grand gothic hall where the activity of students unfolds across a vast marble interior. It begins from a stationary third-person viewpoint on an upper balcony, capturing the scale of the architecture and the central equestrian fountain below. As the camera holds its position, students in dark robes drift through the space, with some figures crossing the immediate foreground while others congregate around the water feature. The scene remains focused on this sweeping vista, emphasizing the contrast between the stationary observer and the fluid movement of the scholars navigating the grand staircases and open floors.
